form.formComment: Won two starts back over 520m at Wentworth Park. Last start she finished 3rd on April 10 over 440m at Goulburn behind Galba Model beaten 4.5 lengths (25.15) in a Grade 5. Draw likely to suit. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Easy winner showing plenty of speed to score by 17 lengths in a Mix last start at this track, clocking a brilliant 29.54 for the 520m trip. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn, lost momentum and raced wide.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start by 1.5 lengths at Wentworth Park (29.51) beating Eureka Mac in a Grade 5 on April 9. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 622m at Richmond. That followed a win two back in 29.95 beating Boston Strong over 520m at Richmond. In the money last time but has the job ahead.
